## FILOSOFIAS CORE (Top 10)

1. **Holistic Marketing Over Single-Channel Mastery** — "Pretty good at all of it is a thousand times easier than world-class at one."
2. **Math Over Emotion** — "We rarely make decisions based on math. The game is won by removing emotion entirely."
3. **Imperfect Action Beats Perfect Inaction** — "Don't write checks to fear. Some action is better than none."
4. **The Supersystem Principle** — "Build the holistic Supersystem first. Then run traffic."
5. **Demonstrate You Can Help By Actually Helping** — "Results in advance. The oldest trick in the book."
6. **Radical Transparency** — "I literally say 'this is an ad and I'm going to try to sell you something.'"
7. **Platform Is Irrelevant** — "All the platform is, is a way of delivering words and pictures to somebody on their phone."
8. **Data Is King** — "If you don't have the metrics, you are dead."
9. **The Rule of Damnits** — "People always wait until the last minute to buy. If you quit before the last day, you're missing 60%+ of revenue."
10. **All Campaigns Eventually Die** — "You just have to adjust things all the time."

---

## FRAMEWORKS CHAVE

### Supersystem Architecture (Week 3)
O sistema holístico de marketing online: ads → lead capture → email follow-up → sales process → one-click upsells → retargeting. Todos os componentes conectados e automatizados.

### Level 1→2→3 Campaign Scaling Path (Weeks 4-6)
- **Level 1:** Seed campaigns — $5/day, 20+ audiences, BAT + BA strategy
- **Level 2:** Scale winners — vertical (increase budget) + horizontal (CBO, new creatives)
- **Level 3:** Cost cap/bid cap campaigns — 4 ad sets com bids incrementais

### 7 Building Blocks of Ad Campaigns (Week 4)
1. The Offer 2. After-Click Experience 3. Creative 4. Audience 5. Objective 6. Bid Strategy 7. Media Strategy

### Three Ad Script Frameworks (Week 8)
1. **Lead Gen:** Hook → Attract/Repel → Educate → CTA
2. **High-Ticket Irresistible Offer:** State offer → Clarify/Repel → Social proof → Repel again → CTA → Reassure
3. **Low-Ticket/E-Com:** Hook/Pre-pitch → Educate/Demo → CTA → Urgency/Risk reversal

### Diagnostic Funnel Checklist (Week 6)
11-step bottleneck identification: Campaign settings → Ad set level → Data accuracy → Tech working → CTR → CPM → Opt-in rate → Email opens → Email clicks → Order form → Purchase

### Three-Rule Ad Automation (Week 6)
1. Stop-Loss: Pause at max CPA with zero sales
2. Long-term Guard: Pause if CPA exceeds target with sufficient spend
3. Auto-Scale: Increase budget 10% twice daily if CPA under target

## HEURÍSTICAS NUMÉRICAS (Top 15)

| Heurística | Valor | Fonte |
|-----------|-------|-------|
| Seed campaign budget per ad set | $5/day | Week 4 |
| Minimum data window for decisions | 3 days (preferir 7) | Week 4 |
| Max budget scaling per day | 25% | Week 5 |
| CTR below threshold = ad problem | < 1% | Week 6 |
| Retargeting audience window | 30 days | Week 6 |
| Cost cap ad sets per campaign | 4 (incremental bids) | Week 6 |
| Auto-scale frequency | 10% every 12 hours | Week 6 |
| Last day of deadline = revenue % | 60-70%+ | Week 7 |
| Countdown emails for 3-day promo | 5-6 emails | Week 7 |
| YouTube CPL (quality US leads) | $11-$20 | Week 8 |
| YouTube ROAS with follow-up | 3x-5x over time | Week 8 |
| First 5 seconds of YouTube ad | State what video is about | Week 8 |
| YouTube bid multiplier | 3.5x willingness to pay | Week 9 |
| Starting budget per YouTube campaign | $30-$50/day | Week 9 |
| Automation budget decrease if CPA high | -20% daily | Week 10 |
